name: Albondegas
recipeIngredient: 4 Carrots - halved lengthwise and cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a large pot. Bring to a boil.
2. Add potatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Drop in prepared meatballs (below) and carrots. Simmer for another 10 minutes.
4. Add celery. Continue simmering until vegetables are tender, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Garnish with sliced green onions.
